forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Areas of morning frost near the Barossa Valley. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 10 and 14.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the Barossa Valley. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then turning northwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Areas of morning frost near the eastern border. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Patches of morning frost near the eastern border. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 14.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Patches of morning frost in the north. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog and frost in the east in the morning. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost south of Hawker. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost south of Hawker. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost on and east of the ranges. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Cloudy. Areas of morning frost east of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, becoming less likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost south of Coober Pedy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost north of Coober Pedy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Areas of morning frost north of Marla. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly sunny. Areas of morning frost south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Mostly sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
